# Vaibhav — AI Solutions Engineer & Implementation Partner

> I design and ship production AI/ML systems on a strong full-stack foundation:
> RAG chatbots, predictive ML models, and AI agents that automate the operations
> and admin work companies usually do by hand. I own problems end to end —
> scope, build, host, ship.

## About
AI Solutions Engineer with 3–5 years building and shipping production AI/ML
systems. Pragmatic about cost and privacy (self-hosted models where it matters,
APIs where they earn their keep), with a strong eye for UX. AI-native workflow:
Claude + Cursor.

## Skills
- AI & LLMs: RAG, self-hosted Llama on vLLM, Anthropic Claude API, embeddings, Qdrant, prompting, grounding
- AI Agents & Automation: agentic workflows, layered matching, human-in-the-loop, automated reporting, event notifications
- Machine Learning: XGBoost / gradient boosting, forecasting, feature engineering, cross-validation
- Engineering & Infra: Python, FastAPI, JS/TS, React, Node.js, Docker, Nginx, RunPod GPU pods, VPS

## Projects
- RAG-Enabled Chatbots (AI / LLM): /projects/rag-chatbots.html
- ML Vendor-Price Prediction (Machine Learning): /projects/ml-vendor-pricing.html
- Reconciliation-Report Agent (AI Agents): /projects/reconciliation-agent.html
- Parcel-Tracking & Delay-Notifier (Automation): /projects/parcel-tracking-automation.html
- AI Outreach Engine (Generative): /projects/outreach-engine.html
